key.name: api-key
key.description: Your personal API key from Clockify Profile Settings → API.

key.name: workspace-id
key.description: The ID of your default Clockify workspace.

key.name: panel-appearance
key.description: 0 = label only, 1 = icon only, 2 = icon and label.

key.name: show-clockify-dropdown
key.summary: Global keybinding to toggle the Clockify dropdown
key.description: Keyboard shortcut that opens/closes the Clockify panel menu.
